prompt_text:
### Demographics: 48-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 82.2 kg; Height 165.5 cm; BMI 30.0 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.5%; 9 months ago 6.1%; 6 months ago 6.2%; 3 months ago 5.8%; current 6.1%), FPG (12 months ago 132mg/dL; 9 months ago 128mg/dL; 6 months ago 125mg/dL; 3 months ago 108mg/dL; current 129mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 83.7kg; 9 months ago 85.9kg; 6 months ago 81.9kg; 3 months ago 81.9kg; current 82.2kg), Height (12 months ago 165.5cm; 9 months ago 165.5cm; 6 months ago 165.5cm; 3 months ago 165.5cm; current 165.5cm), BMI (12 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 30.0kg/m²; current 30.0kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 71mmHg; 9 months ago 71mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 22U/L; 9 months ago 21U/L; 6 months ago 28U/L; 3 months ago 22U/L; current 26U/L), AST (12 months ago 10U/L; 9 months ago 16U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 14U/L; current 13U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.3mg/dL; current 0.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 27mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 968mg/g; 9 months ago 674mg/g; 6 months ago 678mg/g; 3 months ago 935mg/g; current 716mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 88mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 50mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 157mg/dL; 9 months ago 162mg/dL; 6 months ago 143mg/dL; 3 months ago 160mg/dL; current 150mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 9.7g/dL; 9 months ago 9.6g/dL; 6 months ago 9.6g/dL; 3 months ago 9.7g/dL; current 9.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
